message:
feat(fp-columnar): add Column abs/shift/clip/round/isin parity (frankenpandas-4j5a)

Five Column methods matching pd.Series primitives:

- abs() — element-wise absolute value for Int64/Float64/Timedelta64;
  Bool/Utf8 return TypeError (pandas also raises on non-numeric .abs).
  Missing positions pass through unchanged.
- shift(periods, fill) — positional shift with fill for vacated slots;
  positive shifts right (vacates head), negative shifts left
  (vacates tail); abs(periods) >= len fills every position.
- clip(lower, upper) — Option<f64> bounds; None on either side
  disables that clamp. Result dtype is Float64. Non-numeric inputs
  return a type error.
- round(decimals) — rounds Float64 values; negative decimals round
  left of the decimal point; Int64 with decimals >= 0 is a no-op
  (preserves dtype).
- isin(needles) — Bool column of membership; null positions map to
  false (pandas convention).

Co-lands frankenpandas-t153 (shift), 25wo (clip), 8ydb (round),
fsoj (isin).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
